variables.notes: Used the most granular recurring interest-related rows and excluded broad 'Financial expenses' because that line appears contaminated by valuation/fair-value items (e.g., 'Value adjustment of financial liabilities and assets'). Manual review recommended because explicit interest coverage appears incomplete in some years, especially 2025.
